'''Guth''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] tusker from [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]. He was the brother of the trading captain [[Ugmush]]. Guth was small by Gamorrean standards but was aggressive and dedicated to his goals. He was infatuated by the clan matron of the [[Bolgoink clan]], [[Kufbrug]] and challenged her husband [[Vrokk]] to a fight to the death for the hand of his wife.<ref name="Slushtime" />
